channel.title: AI on Jamie Craane personal blog
channel.description: Recent content in AI on Jamie Craane personal blog

item.title: Bridging Human Intent and AI Code Generation with @AIGuideline
item.description: Introduction As AI-powered coding assistants become increasingly prevalent in software development, a new challenge emerges: how do we ensure that AI-generated code aligns with our project’s specific architectural patterns, design principles, and coding standards? Traditional documentation, while valuable, often exists separately from the code itself. Developers—both human and AI—must context-switch between the codebase and external documentation, leading to potential misalignment and inconsistencies. Enter @AIGuideline: a simple yet powerful annotation that embeds architectural and design guidance directly into your codebase, making it immediately discoverable by AI assistants during code generation.
